page_metadata.biotools__summary: Software package to fit a Bayesian Gaussian mixture model (GMM) on the SNP array signal intensity data, and infer individual’s allele-specific copy number genotypes at genome-wide SNP loci in a SNP array.
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: Software package to fit a Bayesian Gaussian mixture model (GMM) on the SNP array signal intensity data, and infer individual’s allele-specific copy number genotypes at genome-wide SNP loci in a SNP array.
